subject: [PATCH v2 06/13] sunrpc: add helpers to count and snapshot pending cache requests

2026-03-25.patch_summary: This patch adds two new functions, sunrpc_cache_requests_count() and sunrpc_cache_requests_snapshot(), to the Linux kernel's SunRPC implementation. These functions allow callers to count and snapshot the pending upcall request list without exposing internal data structures. The count function returns the number of requests with CACHE_PENDING set, while the snapshot function takes a reference on each item so it can be safely used after the queue lock is released. This patch will be used by the nfsd generic netlink dumpit handler for svc_export upcall requests.
